original_image_tags: The page is a carbon copy or thin paper original with text visible in reverse through the back. There are three punch holes at the top. Multiple receipt stamps are present.

elements.description: FBI receiving stamp in blue ink in the middle of the page, reading 'FBI REC'D WICK' with a date of 'AUG 22 PM 5 6 AM 67'.
FBI receiving stamp in green ink near the bottom, reading 'FBI RECEIVED - BUREAU' with a date of 'Aug 22 H 18 AM 67'.
Stamped text in the bottom right corner reading 'EXP. PROC. AUG 23 1967'.
Stamped text in the bottom right reading 'ENCLOSURE'.
Stamped text in the bottom right reading 'ENCL. MENTD. END.'.
Stamped date in the bottom left reading 'at SEP 12 1967'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of multiple receipt stamps and provide complementary details about their locations and text without contradiction.
